Archetype, counters and so on, just general info and insights
I mean... The usual alva team, or stuffs like doresin gramona? You can copy doresain's 60 alienus regen and spam exalt
Although you have to be careful because it's kind of precise setup
And can't snipe people
You can also stuff like really annoying clem team
If you have the p2w wheel that regen alienus missing
You can equip it on her and constantly discard their cards with other alienus regen allies such as winkle or corpo
It's cancerous but only works for whale
You can also do battery thais
Same wheel p2w
And you charge thais so she constantly heal while giving 50 alienus
You can also erica + fouette wheel
And copy her taunt + fortify card

Not that good tbh, it might work until around 1800 points but rapidly fell short because, lotan will mainly rely on her card that get increased dmg upon kills, no proper dps aside from her so if lotan dies and you don't have tawil's 3 cost yet during the turn she dies, you're kinda fucked
Some wheels are decent but not that good for their units considering they need exalt or doesn't prevent shit against one shot comp such as helot
Your main dmg source is probably lotan, you don't have a way to stall enemies properly to prevent one shot
Yes, aigis can stun but if they have cleanse, it's kind of pointless
Which awakener have cleanse ? I only know tinct so far
One way of stalling enemies would be debuffs such as para / stagnation / entwine / wheels effects / posse that destroy their strat with either gun's cry or discard cards, clem count too
Tinct, cassiah ( RNG ), doll, leigh ( delayed ), horla ( need exalt ), Ogier ( only on self )
Oh thanks to hear so only horla for the limited
Yeah and it's a bit underwhelming because need the enhancement from exalt
Oh sad haha then how about dispel like miryam?
You mainly use her for the enhancement + poison pierce with nymph strat
Will note that poison is annoying
Miryam ( AoE ) + Tinct + salvador + pollux + cassiah ( RNG ) + Faint ( Steal instead of dispel ) + Doll

Not that much, hard to setup horla + nymph because both need exalt to make it work and it's only targeting 2 units to properly one shot during a turn, the 2 other units will survive and they might 2 vs 4 if you are not careful
You're better off with helot that target everyone with one shot
You mainly do something like horla exalt, use horla poison to hit 2 enemies with around 30 poison stacks
Then double it with nymph exalt
And trigger poison from nymph card
